name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash in Memphis, TN offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000, plus in-store check cashing and money services.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a national short-term lending brand operating physical retail stores across multiple states. The Memphis location at 5126 Summer Avenue in Tennessee offers both loan products and money services under one roof. The store is open six days a week with extended hours on Mondays and Fridays until 7pm and Saturday hours until 4pm. Customers can begin applications online and complete the process in-store with staff assistance.

This location offers three personal loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due on or around the borrower's next pay date; a revolving Line of Credit up to $4,000 that allows borrowers to draw varying amounts and replenish their limit as they repay; and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by the borrower's vehicle. All products require a valid government-issued ID, proof of income or employment, a working phone number, valid email, and proof of address. Title Loan applicants must additionally bring a drivable vehicle for in-store appraisal and a clear title. The store also offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa Debit Cards.

The store's primary differentiator is hands-on in-person service. Staff are available to walk borrowers through loan options, complete applications, and answer questions about terms, funding timelines, and repayment at every step — including while signing loan documents. The Line of Credit product offers more flexibility than a standard payday loan, allowing borrowers to access funds as needed up to their limit and repay over time, making it better suited for ongoing or variable expenses. The bundling of lending and financial services in a single location reduces the number of stops consumers need to make.

Speedy Cash serves consumers who need fast cash access and cannot wait on traditional bank underwriting. However, payday loans and title loans are among the highest-cost borrowing products available, and the payday loan ceiling at this location — $425 — is lower than what many competing short-term lenders offer. Title loans carry the added risk of vehicle repossession if the borrower defaults. Tennessee's posted Rates and Terms should be reviewed carefully before applying, and borrowers should consider lower-cost alternatives such as credit union payday alternative loans or employer advances before using this service.
pros: Three loan products at one location: payday loans, line of credit, and title loans
Line of credit goes up to $4,000 with revolving access as the balance is repaid
Title loans up to $4,000 available to borrowers who own a clear-title vehicle
In-store staff assist throughout the application, document signing, and funding process
Also offers check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers — useful for unbanked customers
Green Dot Visa Debit Card available in-store for customers without a bank account
Extended weekday hours (until 7pm Mon and Fri) and Saturday access until 4pm
cons: Payday loan maximum is $425 — lower than many short-term lenders in Tennessee
Title loans require the vehicle to be brought in-store for appraisal — no remote or online option
Closed Sundays, which limits access for true weekend emergencies
Payday and title loans carry high APRs typical of short-term lending — costs are not disclosed on the store page
No mention of credit bureau reporting, so loan repayment will not build the borrower's credit history
best_for: Tennessee consumers who need up to $425 quickly and have verifiable income but limited savings
Vehicle owners who need more than a payday loan and can offer a clear-title car as collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need check cashing, a prepaid card, or wire transfers alongside a loan
Borrowers who prefer in-person assistance when applying for or signing short-term loan documents
diagnosis: Speedy Cash at this Memphis location is best suited for Tennessee consumers who need small, fast loans and prefer face-to-face service over online-only lenders. The $425 payday loan cap limits its utility for larger short-term needs, though the $4,000 line of credit and title loan options serve qualifying borrowers with bigger gaps. As with all payday and title lenders, costs are high — exhaust lower-cost alternatives before applying.
services: Revolving Line of Credit up to $4,000
In-store loan application and document signing assistance
